items.headline: Lithium mining stocks broadly fall, U.S. Albemarle down over 4%
items.snippet: On Thursday, lithium mining stocks broadly fell, U.S. Albemarle (ALB.US) down over 4%, Chilean chemical and mining (SQM.US) down 3%, Sigma Lithium (SGML.US) down over 2%, Lithium Argentina (LAR.US) down nearly 1%.

items.headline: Albemarle (ALB) Stock Could Be 24.6% Undervalued After Recent Share Price Weakness
items.snippet: Albemarle fair value sits at 12.74, well above the last close. However, risks remain if lithium prices stay weak for longer or if industry oversupply keeps pressure on margins.

items.headline: Albemarle raised to buy at Citi with underappreciated growth opportunities ahead
items.snippet: Citi analyst Pat Cunningham sees Albemarle as one of the primary beneficiaries of structural lithium demand tailwinds given its high-quality assets, conversion network, and potential to allocate a steady capital program to high-return growth projects.

items.headline: Global X Lithium & Battery Tech ETF Experiences Big Outflow
items.snippet: Global X Lithium & Battery Tech ETF (LIT) detected approximately 54.0 million dollar outflow -- a 7.4% decrease week over week.
